mapper.select: SELECT i.batch_task_item_id AS batchTaskItemId, i.batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, i.product_id AS productId, i.location_id AS locationId, i.required_qty AS requiredQty, i.picked_qty AS pickedQty, i.status, i.completed_at AS completedAt, i.last_scanned_at AS lastScannedAt, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_image AS productImage, p.barcode FROM batch_task_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE i.batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND i.location_id = #{locationId} AND i.product_id = #{productId} AND i.status IN ('PENDING', 'IN_PROGRESS')

SELECT i.batch_task_item_id AS batchTaskItemId, i.batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, i.product_id AS productId, i.location_id AS locationId, i.required_qty AS requiredQty, i.picked_qty AS pickedQty, i.status, i.completed_at AS completedAt, i.last_scanned_at AS lastScannedAt, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_image AS productImage, p.barcode FROM batch_task_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE i.batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND i.location_id = #{locationId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batch_task_items WHERE batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'IN_PROGRESS')

SELECT i.batch_task_item_id AS batchTaskItemId, i.batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, i.product_id AS productId, i.location_id AS locationId, i.required_qty AS requiredQty, i.picked_qty AS pickedQty, i.status, i.completed_at AS completedAt, i.last_scanned_at AS lastScannedAt, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_image AS productImage, p.barcode FROM batch_task_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE i.batch_task_item_id = #{batchTaskItemId}
mapper.update: UPDATE batch_task_items SET picked_qty = picked_qty + #{increment}, last_scanned_at = NOW() WHERE batch_task_item_id = #{batchTaskItemId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND picked_qty + #{increment} <= required_qty
UPDATE batch_task_items SET status = #{status}, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DONE' OR #{status} = 'ISSUE' THEN NOW() ELSE completed_at END WHERE batch_task_item_id = #{batchTaskItemId}
mapper.select: SELECT i.batch_task_item_id AS batchTaskItemId, i.batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, i.product_id AS productId, i.location_id AS locationId, i.required_qty AS requiredQty, i.picked_qty AS pickedQty, i.status, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_image AS productImage, p.barcode, l.location_code AS locationCode FROM batch_task_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id JOIN zone_locations l ON i.location_id = l.location_id WHERE i.batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND i.status IN ('PENDING', 'IN_PROGRESS') ORDER BY CASE WHEN i.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 1 WHEN i.location_id = #{currentLocationId} THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, i.batch_task_item_id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT i.batch_task_item_id AS batchTaskItemId, i.batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, i.product_id AS productId, i.location_id AS locationId, i.required_qty AS requiredQty, i.picked_qty AS pickedQty, i.status, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_image AS productImage, p.barcode, l.location_code AS locationCode, iss.issue_type AS issueType, iss.admin_decision AS adminDecision FROM batch_task_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id JOIN zone_locations l ON i.location_id = l.location_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT batch_task_item_id, issue_type, admin_decision, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY batch_task_item_id ORDER BY created_at DESC) as rn FROM issues ) iss ON i.batch_task_item_id = iss.batch_task_item_id AND iss.rn = 1 WHERE i.batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batch_task_items bti JOIN batch_tasks bt ON bti.batch_task_id = bt.batch_task_id WHERE bt.batch_id = #{batchId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batch_task_items bti JOIN batch_tasks bt ON bti.batch_task_id = bt.batch_task_id WHERE bt.batch_id = #{batchId} AND bti.status = 'DONE'
mapper.update: UPDATE batch_task_items SET picked_qty = #{pickedQty}, last_scanned_at = NOW() WHERE batch_task_item_id = #{batchTaskItemId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batch_task_items WHERE batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
